title: Student personal information.
summary: An act to amend Sections 22584 and 22586 of, to add Section 22586.1 to, to add Chapter 22.2.6 (commencing with Section 22587) to Division 8 of, to repeal Section 22587 of, and to repeal and add Section 22585 of, the Business and Professions Code, relating to privacy.

actions.action: Read first time. To print.
From printer. May be heard in committee March 23.
Referred to Coms. on P. & C.P. and JUD.
From committee chair, with author's amendments: Amend, and re-refer to Com. on P. & C.P. Read second time and amended.
Re-referred to Com. on P. & C.P.
In committee: Set, first hearing. Hearing canceled at the request of author.
In committee: Hearing postponed by committee.
From committee chair, with author's amendments: Amend, and re-refer to Com. on P. & C.P. Read second time and amended.
Re-referred to Com. on P. & C.P.
Assembly Rule 56 suspended. (Page 3717.)
(Pending re-refer to Com. on JUD.)
From committee: Do pass and re-refer to Com. on JUD. (Ayes 11. Noes 2.) (January 13). Re-referred to Com. on JUD.
From committee: Amend, and do pass as amended and re-refer to Com. on APPR. (Ayes 10. Noes 2.) (January 15).
Read second time and amended.
Re-referred to Com. on APPR.
Assembly Rule 63 suspended. (Page 3806.)
In committee: Set, first hearing. Referred to suspense file.
From committee: Do pass. (Ayes 14. Noes 1.) (January 22).
Read second time. Ordered to third reading.
Read third time. Passed. Ordered to the Senate. (Ayes 65. Noes 5. Page 3835.)
In Senate. Read first time. To Com. on RLS. for assignment.

votes.description: Do pass and be re-referred to the Committee on [Judiciary]
Do pass as amended and be re-referred to the Committee on [Appropriations]
